title: DateRangeField
description: Date range picker with a dual-calendar popover and preset shortcuts.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Range picker with a dual-calendar popover and medium display format by default.

presets.title: With presets
presets.desc: Enable show-presets to add quick shortcuts like today, this week or this month.

minMax.title: Min and max
minMax.desc: Restrict the selectable range using minDate and maxDate.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: The field dims, blocks the popover and preserves the visible range.

props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when no range is selected.
props.months: Number of months visible in the popover.
props.showPresets: Shows a column with preset shortcuts (today, week, month…).
props.minDate: Minimum selectable date in the calendar.
props.maxDate: Maximum selectable date in the calendar.
props.minRange: Minimum number of days between start and end.
props.maxRange: Maximum number of days between start and end.
props.clearable: Shows a button to clear the range.

emits.clear: Emitted when the range is cleared.

types.title: DateRangeField
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the DateRangeField component props. Supports dual-calendar range picker with preset shortcuts, min/max constraints and configurable months.
types.label: Human-readable label shown in the preset list.
types.value: Tuple with the start and end Date of the range.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbArrow: Navigate days in the calendar grids
a11y.ariaExpanded: Communicates whether the popover is open or closed
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the trigger for screen reader context
a11y.ariaRequired: Set to true when the required prop is active
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusNative: Uses a native button as trigger — participates in the tab order by default
a11y.focusTrap: Focus is trapped inside the popover while it is open
